name: Sitagliptin Phosphate Monohydrate And Metformin Hydrochloride Tablets
about: Sitagliptin Phosphate Monohydrate And Metformin Hydrochloride Tablets are a combination medication used to treat type 2 diabetes. The tablets contain 50mg of Sitagliptin Phosphate Monohydrate and 500mg of Metformin Hydrochloride. Sitagliptin works by increasing the levels of incretin hormones in the body, which helps to regulate blood sugar levels. Metformin works by decreasing the production of glucose in the liver and improving insulin sensitivity. This medication is prescribed by doctors and should be taken as per their instructions. The tablets are available in physical form and should be stored in a dry and cool place.

faq.q: What is Sitagliptin Phosphate Monohydrate And Metformin Hydrochloride Tablets used for?
faq.a: Sitagliptin Phosphate Monohydrate And Metformin Hydrochloride Tablets are used to treat type 2 diabetes.

faq.q: What are the dosage guidelines for this medication?
faq.a: The dosage of Sitagliptin Phosphate Monohydrate And Metformin Hydrochloride Tablets should be taken as per the doctors suggestion. The standard dosage is 50mg of Sitagliptin Phosphate Monohydrate and 500mg of Metformin Hydrochloride.

faq.q: What are the storage instructions for this medication?
faq.a: This medication should be stored in a dry and cool place to maintain its effectiveness.

faq.q: What is the physical form of this medication?
faq.a: Sitagliptin Phosphate Monohydrate And Metformin Hydrochloride Tablets are available in physical form as tablets.
This medication is manufactured in India and supplied by exporters, suppliers, and traders.
